name: pi-coding-agent
description: Integrate the pi coding agent CLI into VS Code via the integrated terminal

piCodingAgent.defaultArgs.description: Default arguments to pass to the pi CLI on every invocation (e.g. '--model openai/gpt-4o --thinking low').

piCodingAgent.editorCommand.description: Command exported as EDITOR and VISUAL in Pi terminals. If empty, Pi falls back to the existing VISUAL/EDITOR environment variables, then to 'code --wait'.

piCodingAgent.virtualEnvironmentOverride.description: When true, the extension briefly disables Python terminal environment activation while creating a Pi terminal, preventing virtual-environment activation text from being injected into pi. Set to false to disable this workaround.

piCodingAgent.virtualEnvironmentDrainMs.description: Milliseconds to wait after creating a Pi terminal before restoring 'python.terminal.activateEnvironment'. The delay lets the Python extension's onDidOpenTerminal handler observe the temporarily-disabled value so it skips injecting venv activation commands. Ignored when 'piCodingAgent.virtualEnvironmentOverride' is false. Set to 0 to restore immediately (may race with the Python extension).
